title: Boshlash & Metod
lede: Til yodlash emas, odat. Bu yerda samarali o'rganish usulini, IELTS nima ekanini va o'z maqsadingni aniqlaysan — keyin daraja-daraja ko'tarilasan.
doc:
Eng katta xato — grammatikani yodlab, gapirmaslik. Til ikki narsadan o'sadi: kirish (input) — eshitish va o'qish; chiqish (output) — gapirish va yozish. Har kuni ikkalasini ham qil.

Samarali usul (har kuni)

20 daq tinglash20 daq o'qish15 daq yangi so'z10 daq gapirish/yozish

Kuniga 1 soat — haftada 7 soat. Bu 3 oyda sezilarli natija beradi. Muhimi: uzluksizlik, ko'p emas.

Birinchi 20 ibora (survival English)

Hello / HiSalom
How are you?Qalaysiz?
Nice to meet you.Tanishganimdan xursandman.
Sorry, I don't understand.Kechirasiz, tushunmadim.
Can you repeat, please?Iltimos, takrorlaysizmi?
Thank you / ThanksRahmat
My name is ...Mening ismim ...
I am from Uzbekistan.Men O'zbekistondanman.

IELTS nima?

IELTS — inglizcha darajangni o'lchaydigan xalqaro imtihon. 4 ta bo'lim: Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking. Har biri 1 dan 9 gacha band bilan baholanadi, umumiy ball — o'rtacha.

Band 5–6 = B1/B2Band 6.5–7 = ko'p universitetBand 7+ = kuchli daraja

Maqsadingni belgila

Avval kerakli band'ni aniqla (masalan 6.5). Maqsadsiz o'rganish sekin ketadi. Maqsad — yo'lni qisqartiradi.

Keng tarqalgan xato

Tarjima qilib gapirma

O'zbekcha o'ylab, so'zma-so'z tarjima qilma — bu sekin va noto'g'ri. Tayyor iboralarni (chunk) butunligicha yodla: "How are you?" ni so'z-so'z emas, bitta bo'lak sifatida.

Chuqurroq: IELTS band nimani bildiradi

BandDarajaMa'no
9ExpertMukammal, ona tilidek
7–8GoodErkin, kam xato
6–6.5CompetentKo'p universitet talabi
5–5.5ModestAsosiy muloqot
4LimitedCheklangan

Shadowing — talaffuz uchun kuchli usul

Qisqa audio (10–20 soniya) tinglab, baravar takrorlab boring — ohang, urg'u va tezlikni nusxa qiling. Kuniga 5 daqiqa shadowing talaffuzni tez yaxshilaydi.

Lug'atdan to'g'ri foydalan

Har yangi so'zda: talaffuz (audio), so'z turkumi (n/v/adj) va misol gapni ko'r. Faqat tarjimani emas.

title: A1 · Beginner
lede: to be (am/is/are), olmoshlar va Present Simple — inglizchaning poydevori. Shular bilan o'zing va atrofing haqida gapira olasan.
doc:
Subject pronouns (olmoshlar)

Imen
yousen/siz
he / she / itu (erkak/ayol/jonsiz)
webiz
theyular

Verb "to be" — am / is / are

I am (I'm) a student.Men talabaman.
She is (She's) from Tashkent.U Toshkentdan.
They are (They're) my friends.Ular mening do'stlarim.
Are you ready?Tayyormisan?

Present Simple — odatiy ishlar

Doimiy yoki takroriy harakat uchun. He/she/it bilan fe'lga -s qo'shiladi.

I work every day.Men har kuni ishlayman.
She works in a bank.U bankda ishlaydi.
We don't (do not) drink coffee.Biz qahva ichmaymiz.
Do you speak English?Inglizcha gapirasanmi?

a / an / the

a book, an applenoaniq (bittasi)
the sun, the book on the tableaniq (ma'lum)

Eng ko'p xato

He/she/it bilan -s ni unutma: "She work" emas, "She works". Va "I am agree" emas — "I agree".

Ko'proq misol: savol yasash

Do you like tea?Choy yoqadimi?
Does she work here?U shu yerda ishlaydimi?
Where do you live?Qayerda yashaysan?

Eng katta xato

"She don't" ❌ — to'g'risi "She doesn't". He/she/it bilan does/doesn't.

Chuqurroq: "to be" to'liq jadval

ShaxsTasdiqInkorQisqa
II amI am notI'm
you/we/theyareare notaren't
he/she/itisis notisn't

This / That / These / Those

this book (yaqin, birlik)bu kitob
that car (uzoq, birlik)u mashina
these books (yaqin, ko'plik)bu kitoblar
those cars (uzoq, ko'plik)u mashinalar

Egalik: my / your / his / her

This is my phone.Bu mening telefonim.
Her name is Aziza.Uning ismi Aziza.

So'z tartibi (juda muhim)

Ingliz gapi qat'iy tartibda: Ega + Fe'l + To'ldiruvchi.

I (ega) speak (fe'l) English (to'ldiruvchi).Men inglizcha gapiraman.

Inkor (don't/doesn't) va savol (do/does) yasadim

O'zim haqimda 5 ta gap yozdim va ovoz chiqarib o'qidim

title: A2 · Elementary
lede: Past Simple, going to / will va can bilan o'tgan kun, rejalar va imkoniyatlar haqida gapirasan.
doc:
Past Simple — o'tgan zamon

To'g'ri fe'llarga -ed; noto'g'ri fe'llar yodlanadi (go→went, see→saw).

I worked yesterday.Kecha ishladim.
She went to school.U maktabga bordi.
We didn't (did not) sleep.Biz uxlamadik.
Did you eat?Ovqatlandingmi?

Kelajak: going to / will

I'm going to study tonight.Bugun kechqurun o'qiyman (reja).
I will help you.Senga yordam beraman (qaror/va'da).
It will rain tomorrow.Ertaga yomg'ir yog'adi (bashorat).

can / can't — imkoniyat

I can swim.Suza olaman.
She can't drive.U hayday olmaydi.
Can you help me?Yordam bera olasanmi?

There is / There are

There is a book on the table.Stolda kitob bor.
There are two cars outside.Tashqarida ikkita mashina bor.

Past Simple savolda

Savol va inkorda asosiy fe'l 1-shaklga qaytadi: "Did you go?" (went emas), "She didn't go".

Ko'proq misol: noto'g'ri fe'llar

go → went → gonebormoq
see → saw → seenko'rmoq
have → had → hadega bo'lmoq
buy → bought → boughtsotib olmoq

Eng katta xato

Savol/inkorda fe'l 1-shaklga qaytadi: "Did you go?" (went emas), "I didn't see".

Chuqurroq: -ed talaffuzi va imlosi

QoidaMisolTalaffuz
odatdaworked/t/
d/t bilan tugasawanted/ɪd/
jarangliplayed/d/

Ko'proq noto'g'ri fe'llar

1-shakl2-shakl (past)Ma'no
makemadeqilmoq
taketookolmoq
comecamekelmoq
givegavebermoq
findfoundtopmoq
thinkthoughto'ylamoq

Vaqt belgilari

yesterdaylast week/yeartwo days agoin 2010when I was young

some / any

I have some money. (tasdiq)menda biroz pul bor
I don't have any money. (inkor)menda pul yo'q
Do you have any questions? (savol)savoling bormi?

tasks.html: Past Simple bilan kechagi kunim haqida 5 gap yozdim
10 ta keng tarqalgan noto'g'ri fe'lni yodladim (go/went, see/saw...)
going to va will farqini misollarda ishlatdim
can/can't bilan 5 ta gap qildim
There is / There are bilan xonamni tasvirladim
Kechagi kunim haqida ovozli 1 daqiqalik gapirib berdim

title: B1 · Intermediate
lede: Present Perfect, taqqoslash darajalari va conditionals bilan tajriba, fikr va ehtimollik haqida gapirasan — bu IELTS uchun muhim.
doc:
Present Perfect — have/has + V3

O'tmishda bo'lgan, lekin hozir bilan bog'liq ish (aniq vaqt aytilmaydi).

I have visited London.Londonda bo'lganman (qachondir).
She has just finished.U hozirgina tugatdi.
Have you ever tried sushi?Hech sushi yeb ko'rganmisan?

Past Simple vs Present Perfect: aniq vaqt bor → Past ("I saw him yesterday"); vaqt muhim emas/davom etadi → Perfect ("I have seen that film").

Comparatives & Superlatives

cheaper than...dan arzonroq
more expensive than...dan qimmatroq
the besteng yaxshi
the most importanteng muhim

Conditionals (shartlar)

If I have time, I will call you.Vaqtim bo'lsa, qo'ng'iroq qilaman (real).
If I were rich, I would travel.Boy bo'lganimda, sayohat qilardim (faraziy).

Modals: should / must / might

You should sleep more.Ko'proq uxlashing kerak (maslahat).
I must finish today.Bugun tugatishim shart (majburiyat).
It might rain.Yomg'ir yog'ishi mumkin (ehtimol).

IELTS uchun

Conditionals va modals fikr bildirishda juda kuchli. "I think the government should..." — Writing va Speaking'ni darrov yuqori band'ga olib chiqadi.

Past Simple vs Present Perfect

I saw him yesterday.aniq vaqt → Past
I have seen that film.vaqt muhim emas → Perfect
She has lived here for 5 years.hozir ham davom etadi

Eng katta xato

"I have seen him yesterday" ❌ — aniq o'tgan vaqt (yesterday) bilan Present Perfect ishlatilmaydi → "I saw him yesterday".

Chuqurroq: Present Perfect signal so'zlari

So'zMa'noMisol
alreadyallaqachonI've already eaten.
yethali (savol/inkor)Have you finished yet?
justhozirginaShe's just left.
since...dan beriI've lived here since 2019.
for...davomidaI've known him for 5 years.
ever/neverhech/hech qachonHave you ever been there?

Conditionals jadvali

TurTuzilmaIshlatilishi
0If + present, presentdoimiy haqiqat
1If + present, will + V1real kelajak
2If + past, would + V1faraziy hozir

Present Simple vs Continuous

I work in IT. (doimiy)men IT'da ishlayman
I'm working now. (hozir)men hozir ishlayapman

tasks.html: Present Perfect bilan tajribalarim haqida 5 gap yozdim
Past Simple va Present Perfect farqini misolda ko'rsatdim
Comparative/superlative bilan 5 ta taqqoslash qildim
1-conditional bilan 3 ta real shart yozdim
2-conditional bilan 3 ta faraziy gap yozdim
should/must/might bilan fikrimni bildirdim

quiz.q: Qaysi biri Present Perfect uchun to'g'ri?

"This is ___ film I've ever seen." (eng yaxshi)

title: B2 · Upper-Inter
lede: Passive, relative clauses, reported speech va paraphrasing — IELTS 6.5–7+ uchun zarur grammatik vositalar.
doc:
Passive voice (majhul nisbat)

Kim bajargani muhim bo'lmaganda. be + V3.

English is spoken worldwide.Inglizchada butun dunyoda gapiriladi.
The bridge was built in 1990.Ko'prik 1990-yilda qurilgan.

Relative clauses

The man who called me is my boss.Menga qo'ng'iroq qilgan odam — rahbarim.
The book that I read was great.O'qigan kitobim zo'r edi.

Reported speech

She said she was tired.U charchaganini aytdi.
He told me he would come.U kelishini aytdi.

Paraphrasing (IELTS kaliti)

Bir fikrni boshqacha aytish — yuqori band uchun shart. Sinonim va struktura o'zgartir.

important → crucial / vitalmuhim
a lot of → a significant number ofko'p
good → beneficial / effectiveyaxshi/foydali

Linking words

Murakkab fikrni bog'la: however, moreover, as a result, on the other hand, in addition. Bular Coherence band'ini oshiradi.

Paraphrasing — bir fikr, ko'p shakl

Cars cause pollution.oddiy
Pollution is caused by cars.passive
Vehicles are a major source of pollution.sinonim + struktura

IELTS siri

Bir fikrni 2-3 xil ayta olsang, Lexical va Grammar band'i ko'tariladi. Passive, relative va sinonimlardan foydalan.

Chuqurroq: Passive barcha zamonlarda

ZamonActivePassive
Presentmakeis made
Pastmadewas made
Present Perfecthas madehas been made
Futurewill makewill be made

Relative clause: defining vs non-defining

The man who lives here is a doctor. (defining — vergulsiz)shu yerda yashaydigan odam
My brother, who lives in London, is a teacher. (non-defining — vergul bilan)akam (u Londonda yashaydi)

Reported speech: savollar

"Where do you live?" → He asked where I lived.savol so'roq tartibini yo'qotadi
"Are you ready?" → She asked if I was ready.ha/yo'q savol → if/whether

Yuqori band linkerlar

neverthelessconsequentlyin contrastfor instanceto sum upowing to

tasks.html: Passive bilan 5 ta gap yozdim (be + V3)
who/which/that bilan relative clause'lar yasadim
To'g'ri gapni reported speech'ga aylantirdim
10 ta IELTS sinonimni o'rgandim (important→crucial...)
Bitta jumlani 2 xil paraphrasing qildim
5 ta linking word bilan abzas yozdim

title: Vocabulary & Talaffuz
lede: IELTS band'ining choragi — lexical resource. Bu yerda so'z yasash, collocation va talaffuz asoslarini, hamda eslab qolish usulini o'rganasan.
doc:
Spaced repetition — eslab qolish usuli

Yangi so'zni 1-kun, 3-kun, 7-kun, 14-kun takrorlasang, u uzoq xotiraga o'tadi. Anki kabi ilovalar buni avtomatik qiladi. So'zni misol gap bilan yodla, yakka emas.

Word families (so'z oilalari)

decide (v) → decision (n) → decisive (adj)qaror qilmoq → qaror → qat'iy
create → creation → creativeyaratmoq → yaratish → ijodiy

Collocations (birga keladigan so'zlar)

make a decisionqaror qilmoq (do emas, make)
heavy rainkuchli yomg'ir (strong emas)
take a risktavakkal qilmoq

IELTS mavzu lug'ati

EducationEnvironmentTechnologyHealthWorkSociety

Talaffuz: word stress

Inglizchada urg'u ma'noni o'zgartiradi. REcord (ot) vs reCORD (fe'l). Lug'atda IPA va urg'uni tekshir.

Yakka so'z yodlama

So'zni collocation va misol gap bilan o'rgan. "make a decision" — bu IELTS examiner'ga tabiiy ko'rinadi va lexical band'ni oshiradi.

Prefix va suffix (so'z yasash)

un- (inkor): happy → unhappybaxtsiz
-tion (ot): educate → educationta'lim
-able (sifat): rely → reliableishonchli

Maslahat

Bitta o'zakdan oilani o'rgansang (create/creation/creative), so'z boyliging tez kengayadi.

Chuqurroq: fe'l + ot collocationlari

Fe'lMisollar
makemake a decision, make progress, make a mistake
dodo homework, do research, do business
taketake a risk, take a break, take responsibility
havehave an effect, have a conversation
getget a job, get used to, get in touch

Suffix → so'z turkumi

SuffixTurkumMisol
-tion/-sionoteducation, decision
-mentotdevelopment, government
-able/-iblesifatreliable, possible
-lyravishquickly, carefully
-ise/-izefe'lorganise, realise

IELTS mavzu lug'ati (environment)

pollutionrenewable energycarbon emissionssustainabledeforestationrecycle

title: IELTS Listening
lede: 4 bo'lim, 40 savol. Strategiya: oldindan o'qish, kalit so'z, imloga e'tibor. Audio bir marta eshitiladi — tayyor bo'lish kerak.
doc:
Format

4 bo'lim40 savol30 daq + 10 daq ko'chirishAudio 1 marta

1-2 bo'lim — kundalik mavzular; 3-4 — ta'lim/akademik. Qiyinlik ortib boradi.

Savol turlari

Multiple choiceForm/Note completionMatchingPlan/Map labellingSentence completion

Strategiya

1) Oldindan o'qi: audio boshlanishidan oldin savollarni ko'rib, nima eshitishingni bashorat qil. 2) Kalit so'z: savoldagi kalit so'zlarni belgila, lekin paraphrasingga tayyor bo'l (audio boshqacha so'z ishlatadi). 3) Yozayotganda davom et: bitta javobni o'tkazib yuborsang, to'xtama — keyingisiga o't.

Eng ko'p yo'qotiladigan ball

Imlo va so'z chegarasi

Completion savollarida noto'g'ri imlo = noto'g'ri javob. "NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS" yozilsa, 3 so'z yozsang — 0 ball. Ko'rsatmani diqqat bilan o'qi.

Signpost so'zlar (yo'nalish beradi)

Firstly... / Next... / Finally...ketma-ketlik
However... / On the other hand...qarama-qarshilik

Maslahat

Bu so'zlar audioda keyingi javob qayerda kelishini bildiradi — ularni eshitsang, diqqatni kuchaytir.

Chuqurroq: savol turi bo'yicha strategiya

Savol turiStrategiya
Form/Note completionso'z turini (raqam? ism?) oldindan taxmin qil
Multiple choicebarcha variantni o'qi — distraktorlardan ehtiyot bo'l
Map/Planyo'nalish so'zlarini kuzat (left, next to, opposite)
Matchingro'yxatni oldindan o'qib, ohangni kuzat

Tuzoqlar (distractors)

Audio ko'pincha avval noto'g'ri javobni aytib, keyin tuzatadi: "...at 9, sorry, at 10 o'clock". Oxirgi ma'lumotni ol.

Yo'nalish so'zlari

Map savolida: turn left/right, go straight, on your left, at the corner, opposite, between — bularni yodla.

tasks.html: Listening formatini (4 bo'lim, 40 savol) o'rgandim
tasks.crit: har bo'lim nima haqida ekanini bilasan

tasks.html: 5 ta savol turini taniyman

title: IELTS Reading
lede: 3 ta uzun matn, 40 savol, 60 daqiqa. Sir — har so'zni o'qima. Skimming va scanning bilan vaqtni boshqar.
doc:
Format

3 passage40 savol60 daqiqaAcademic / General

Vaqt — eng katta dushman. Har passage'ga ~20 daqiqa. Javoblarni ko'chirishga alohida vaqt yo'q (Listening'dan farqli).

Savol turlari

True / False / Not GivenMatching headingsMatching informationSentence/Summary completionMultiple choice

Skimming va scanning

Skimming: matnni tez ko'rib chiqib, umumiy mazmun va har abzas haqida nima ekanini tushunish. Scanning: aniq ma'lumot (ism, sana, raqam) ni tez topish uchun ko'z yugurtirish.

True / False / Not Given — eng qiyini

False = matn aksini aytadi. Not Given = matnda umuman yo'q (sen taxmin qila olmaysan). Bu ikkisini farqlash band'ni belgilaydi.

Vaqtni boshqar

Bitta savolda qotib qolma. 1.5 daqiqadan oshsa, taxminiy javob belgilab, keyingisiga o't. Oxirida qaytib kelasan.

True / False / Not Given farqi

Truematn tasdiqlaydi
Falsematn aksini aytadi
Not Givenmatnda umuman yo'q

Eng katta xato

Not Given'ni False bilan adashtirma. False = qarama-qarshi ma'lumot bor; Not Given = ma'lumot yo'q. Taxmin qilma.

Chuqurroq: T/F/NG qaror daraxti

HolatJavob
Matn aynan tasdiqlaydiTRUE
Matn aksini aytadi/ziddiyatFALSE
Matnda bunday ma'lumot yo'qNOT GIVEN

Keyword + paraphrase texnikasi

Savoldagi kalit so'zni top, lekin matn sinonim ishlatishiga tayyor bo'l: savol "important" desa, matn "crucial / significant" deyishi mumkin.

Vaqt rejasi

BosqichVaqt
Passage 1 (oson)~16 daq
Passage 2~20 daq
Passage 3 (qiyin)~24 daq

Hammasini o'qima

Avval savolni o'qi, keyin matnda scanning bilan javobni top. Har so'zni o'qishga vaqt yo'q.

tasks.html: Reading formatini (3 passage, 60 daq) o'rgandim

True/False/Not Given'ni 10 savolda mashq qildim

Bitta to'liq Reading testini 60 daqiqada ishladim

title: IELTS Writing
lede: 2 ta vazifa, 60 daqiqa. Task 2 (esse) ikki baravar muhim. Tuzilma, fikr va til aniqligi — band'ning kaliti.
doc:
Format

Task 1 — 20 daq, 150 so'zTask 2 — 40 daq, 250 so'zTask 2 = 2x ball

Task 1 (Academic): grafik/jadval/jarayonni tasvirlash. (General): xat. Task 2: esse — har ikkalasida bir xil.

4 ta baholash mezoni

Task ResponseCoherence & CohesionLexical ResourceGrammar

Task 2 tuzilmasi

IntroductionMavzuni paraphrasing qil + fikringni ayt (2 jumla)
Body 1Asosiy fikr + tushuntir + misol
Body 2Ikkinchi fikr + tushuntir + misol
ConclusionFikrni qayta umumlashtir

Esse turlari

Opinion (agree/disagree)Discussion (both views)Problem & solutionAdvantages/disadvantages

Foydali iboralar

Some people argue that ...Ba'zilar ta'kidlaydiki ...
In my opinion, ...Mening fikrimcha ...
For instance, ...Masalan, ...
In conclusion, ...Xulosa qilib ...

Eng katta xato

Savolga to'liq javob bermaslik (Task Response past bo'ladi). Savolni diqqat bilan o'qi: "to what extent do you agree?" — fikringni aniq bildirishing shart.

Task 2 — foydali jumla qoliplari

It is often argued that...ko'pincha aytiladiki
There are several reasons for this.buning bir necha sababi bor
In conclusion, I believe that...xulosa qilib, menimcha

Eng katta xato

Savolga to'liq javob berMASLIK (Task Response pasayadi). "To what extent do you agree?" — fikringni ANIQ bildir.

Chuqurroq: Task 1 (grafik) tuzilmasi

QismVazifa
Introductiongrafikni paraphrasing qil
Overviewasosiy tendensiya (eng muhim!)
Details 1–2raqamlar bilan tasvirla

Tendensiya (trend) so'zlari

increase / rise / growoshmoq
decrease / fall / declinekamaymoq
fluctuatetebranmoq
remain stablebarqaror qolmoq
reach a peakcho'qqiga chiqmoq

Task 2 — 4 esse turi qolipi

TurBody tuzilmasi
Opinionfikr + 2 dalil
DiscussionBody1: bir tomon, Body2: ikkinchi + o'z fikr
Problem–SolutionBody1: muammo, Body2: yechim
Adv–DisadvBody1: afzallik, Body2: kamchilik

Overview shart

Task 1'да Overview (umumiy tendensiya) bo'lmasa, band keskin tushadi.

tasks.html: Task 1 va Task 2 farqini va vaqt taqsimotini o'rgandim
4 ta baholash mezonini tushundim
Task 2 tuzilmasini (intro/body/body/conclusion) yodladim
4 ta esse turini ajrataman
Bitta to'liq Task 2 esse (250+ so'z) yozdim
Esseni mezonlar bo'yicha o'zim baholadim (yoki tekshirtirdim)

title: IELTS Speaking
lede: Jonli suhbat. Baholash: Fluency, Lexical, Grammar, Pronunciation. Sir — yodlama, tabiiy va kengaytirilgan javob ber.
doc:
3 qism

Part 1 (4–5 daq)Oddiy savollar: o'zing, ish, uy, sevimli mashg'ulot
Part 2 (3–4 daq)Cue card — 1 daq tayyorlanib, 2 daq monolog
Part 3 (4–5 daq)Part 2 mavzusi bo'yicha chuqurroq muhokama

Baholash mezonlari

Fluency & CoherenceLexical ResourceGrammatical RangePronunciation

Javobni kengaytir

Bitta so'z bilan javob berma. Sabab + misol qo'sh.

Do you like coffee?Savol
Yes.❌ juda qisqa
Yes, I love coffee, especially in the morning, because it helps me focus.✓ kengaytirilgan

Foydali iboralar

Well, I'd say ...Ha, men aytardimki ...
It depends on ......ga bog'liq
To be honest, ...Rostini aytsam, ...
That's a good question.Yaxshi savol (vaqt yutish)

Yodlama!

Yodlangan javob examiner'ga bilinadi va band tushiradi. Tabiiy gapir, kichik xato qilsang ham davom et — ravonlik (fluency) muhimroq.

Javobni kengaytirish (extend)

Yes. ❌juda qisqa
Yes, I do — especially at weekends, because I have more free time. ✓sabab + detal

Eng katta xato

Yodlangan javob bilinadi va band tushiradi. Tabiiy gapir; kichik xato qilsang ham to'xtama — ravonlik (fluency) muhimroq.

Chuqurroq: Part 2 cue card qolipi

Cue card'da 1 daqiqa tayyorgarlikda shu savollarga javob yoz: What? When? Where? Who? Why/How feel? — keyin shular bo'yicha gapir.

Describe a place you like.What place? Where? When go? Why like? How feel?

Part 3 — javob qolipi

Fikr → sabab → misol → muvozanat: "I think... because... For example... However, some people...".

Talaffuz: 3 daraja

DarajaNima
So'z urg'usiREcord (ot) / reCORD (fe'l)
Gap urg'usimuhim so'zlarni kuchli ayt
Linkingso'zlarni bog'la: "an_apple"

Ravonlik > mukammallik

Kichik xato uchun to'xtama. Fillers: "Well...", "Let me think...", "That's interesting..." — tabiiy vaqt yutadi.

tasks.html: 3 qism formatini o'rgandim
Part 1 savollariga kengaytirilgan javob mashq qildim
Cue card (Part 2) bo'yicha 2 daqiqa monolog gapirdim
Part 3 muhokama savollariga fikr bildirdim
Ovozimni yozib, talaffuz va ravonlikni tekshirdim
5 ta tabiiy ibora (fillers) ni o'zlashtirdim
tasks.crit: "It depends", "To be honest" ni tabiiy ishlatasan

title: Strategy & Mock
lede: Bilim — yarmi, imtihon strategiyasi — ikkinchi yarmi. Vaqtni boshqarish, mock testlar va imtihon kuni tartibi band'ingni oshiradi.
doc:
Band qanday hisoblanadi

Har 4 bo'lim 1–9 band oladi, umumiy — o'rtacha (0.5 ga yaxlitlanadi). Masalan L7, R6.5, W6, S7 → o'rtacha 6.625 → 6.5.

Vaqtni boshqarish

Listening30 daq + 10 daq ko'chirish
Reading60 daq — har passage ~20 daq
WritingTask 1 ~20 daq, Task 2 ~40 daq
Speaking11–14 daq jonli suhbat

Mock test — eng muhim mashq

Haftada kamida 1 marta to'liq, vaqtli mock test ishla (real sharoitda). Bu chidamlilik va vaqt hissini rivojlantiradi. Keyin har xatoni tahlil qil — bu eng ko'p ball qo'shadi.

Imtihon kuni

Hujjat (passport)Yaxshi uxlashErta yetib borishListening uchun diqqatVaqtni nazorat qilish

Qachon tayyorsan?

Mock natijasi

Agar 3 ta ketma-ket mock'da maqsadli band'ingga barqaror yetsang — imtihonga yozilish vaqti keldi. Bitta yaxshi natija tasodif bo'lishi mumkin; barqarorlik muhim.

Band hisoblash misoli

L7 · R6.5 · W6 · S7 → 6.625 → 6.5o'rtacha, 0.5 ga yaxlitlanadi

Tayyorlik belgisi

3 ta ketma-ket mock'da maqsadli band'ingga barqaror yetsang — imtihonga yozilish vaqti keldi.

Chuqurroq: imtihon kuni jadvali

TartibBo'lim
1Listening (30 daq + 10 daq ko'chirish)
2Reading (60 daq)
3Writing (60 daq)
AlohidaSpeaking (suhbat, 11–14 daq)

Band oshirishning kalitlari

Bo'limEng katta lever
Listeningoldindan o'qish + imlo
Readingvaqt boshqaruvi + T/F/NG
WritingTask Response + tuzilma + linkerlar
Speakingravonlik + kengaytirilgan javob

Tayyorlik mezoni

3 ta ketma-ket mock'da maqsadli band'ga barqaror yetsang — yozil. Bitta yaxshi natija tasodif bo'lishi mumkin.

tasks.html: Band qanday hisoblanishini (o'rtacha + yaxlitlash) tushundim
Har bo'lim uchun vaqt rejasini tuzdim
tasks.crit: qaysi bo'limga qancha vaqt berishini bilasan

tasks.html: Birinchi to'liq mock testni vaqtli ishladim
Mock xatolarini bo'limlar bo'yicha tahlil qildim
Zaif bo'limga qo'shimcha mashq rejasini tuzdim
Imtihon kuni tartibini (checklist) tayyorladim

project.title: Maqsadli band'ga yetish
project.desc: Maqsadli band'ingga 3 ta ketma-ket mock'da barqaror yetguningcha mashq qil.
rubric: english bo'yicha yakuniy ish mustaqil ishga tushadigan holatda bo'lishi kerak.
Asosiy talablar bajarilgan: funksionallik, aniqlik, xatolarni ko'rsatish va yakuniy natija tekshiriladi.
Kod yoki yozma ish tartibli, nomlash tushunarli, keraksiz murakkabliksiz tayyorlangan.
Natija qisqa izoh bilan topshiriladi: nima qilindi, qanday tekshirildi, keyingi yaxshilash nima.
Kamida bitta real holat yoki foydalanuvchi ssenariysi bilan sinab ko'rilgan.

Xato tahlili eng ko'p ball qo'shadi.

vocab.ex: Do a full mock test weekly.

title: Idiomalar & Phrasal verbs
mtitle: Tabiiy gapirish: idioma va phrasal verb
lede: Ona tilida so'zlashuvchilar so'zma-so'z emas, ibora bilan gapiradi. Bu modulda eng kerakli phrasal verb va idiomalarni o'rganib, nutqni tabiiyroq qilasan.
doc:
Phrasal verb — fe'l + zarf/predlog (masalan give up = taslim bo'lish). Ma'nosi ko'pincha so'zlar yig'indisi emas — butunligicha yodla.

Eng kerakli phrasal verblar

Phrasal verbMa'noMisol
give uptashlab qo'yish / taslimDon't give up.
look forqidirmoqI'm looking for my keys.
find outaniqlash / bilib olmoqI found out the truth.
turn on / offyoqmoq / o'chirmoqTurn off the light.
get upo'rnidan turmoqI get up at 7.

Foydali idiomalar

a piece of cakejuda oson
break the icemuloqotni boshlash
once in a blue moonjuda kam, nadir
hit the booksjiddiy o'qishga kirishmoq

Idiomani tarjima qilma

Idioma so'zma-so'z tarjima qilinmaydi. "It's raining cats and dogs" — mushuk-it yog'ayotgani emas, qattiq yomg'ir degani. Kontekst bilan yodla.

exercises.why: give up = taslim bo'lish yoki biror ishni tashlab qo'yish.
turn off = o'chirmoq; turn on = yoqmoq.
a piece of cake = juda oson ish.
find out = aniqlash/bilib olmoq. O'tgan zamon: found out.
give up = taslim bo'lish. "Don't give up" = taslim bo'lma.

tasks.html: 10 ta phrasal verbni misol gap bilan yozdim va ovoz chiqarib aytdim
5 ta idiomani o'z gapimda ishlatdim
Bir film/serial parchasida phrasal verblarni topdim

project.title: Idiomalar & Phrasal verbs Portfolio Task
project.desc: Idiomalar & Phrasal verbs modulini real natijaga aylantiradigan yakuniy amaliy ish.

quiz.w: break the ice = noqulay jimlikni buzib muloqot boshlash.

vocab.ex: Never give up on your dreams.
I want to find out the truth.
She is looking for a job.
The exam was a piece of cake.
He told a joke to break the ice.

grammar.rule: Ba'zi phrasal verblar o'rtasiga obyekt kiradi: turn it on (turn on it emas).
grammar.ex: Turn the radio on. / Turn it on.

grammar.rule: look for, find out kabilar bo'linmaydi — obyekt oxirda.
grammar.ex: I'm looking for it. (look it for emas)

grammar.rule: Idioma butunligicha yodlanadi, so'zma-so'z tarjima qilinmaydi.
grammar.ex: It's raining cats and dogs = qattiq yomg'ir.
